# Orc Disguise

> [!success] 💍 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Fellowship

*Item. Armor.*

---

Attach to the **_Ring-bearer_**. Limit one per hero.
While an **_Orc_** is making an enagement check with you, it gets +5 engagement cost.
**Response:** After an **_Orc_** engages you, discard Orc Disguise. . Until the end of the round, that enemy cannot attack you.
